name: OP Bancorp
summary: PART I . Overview Founded in 2005 as First Standard Bank, and rebranded as Open Bank in 2010, we formed OP Bancorp as our holding company in 2016. OP Bancorp, headquartered in Los Angeles, California, operates its commercial community banking activities through Open Bank ("Open Bank" or the "Bank"), our wholly owned banking subsidiary. We provide commercial banking services to small and medium-sized businesses, their owners, and retail customers, with a focus on the Korean-American community. We...
